name: Prepayment of Premium Liability for Controlled Groups

eligibility.description: Available to assigned operators who were not 1988 agreement operators, ceased coal production by July 1, 2005, and were members of a publicly traded controlled group as of July 20, 1992.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Certain assigned operators or related persons can elect to make a lump-sum prepayment of the present value of their total future premium liability, potentially shifting the sole future liability to a common parent corporation.
